description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical black barrel and a wooden full stock. The fore-end, also made of wood, is ribbed for grip and located beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The receiver is compact and black, seamlessly connecting the barrel and stock, with a visible trigger and a rounded trigger guard. The overall design is streamlined, with no visible sights or attachments, and the finish is matte with a slight sheen on the metal parts. The shotgun's proportions suggest a standard gauge, suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian use.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long black barrel, wooden full stock, and ribbed wooden fore-end, featuring a matte finish and streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, with the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and black barrel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle of the barrel and the narrow profile of the fore-end and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
